title: pinguicula longifolia subsp. dertosensis
intro: Pinguicula longifolia subsp. dertosensis, also known as the Dertosense butterwort, is a carnivorous plant species belonging to the Droseraceae family, characterized by its unique ability to capture and digest insects to supplement its nutrient-poor soil. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues and digestive problems due to its mucilaginous and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Pinguicula longifolia subsp. dertosensis include soothing coughs and colds, reducing inflammation, and aiding in the recovery from various gastrointestinal disorders. Traditionally, the plant is used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and salves, which are often used externally to treat skin irritations and internally to address respiratory and digestive issues.
